_comment: Reference list for Apify LinkedIn actor + future scrapers. Wired in code: Arbeitsagentur API (DE government), EURES EU portal, Arbeitnow API, StepStone/Indeed/Adzuna RSS (when reachable), Jooble (JOOBLE_API_KEY).

notes.apify: Use apify_linkedin_germany.json for actor input; set APIFY_DATASET_ID to the new DE dataset.
notes.indeed_rss: Indeed blocks RSS (403) ÔÇö use Apify or Jooble instead.
notes.stepstone_rss: StepStone RSS URLs often 404 ÔÇö Arbeitnow expanded fetch is the main free source today.
